name: Fila Mendacii
description:
Your girlfriend sought the love of another man.
Meanwhile, her best friend filled that gap she left.
She'll fill your heart and make you feel loved.

•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 💔 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

Elara Mistwood

Th̴e̷ ̶G̶i̴r̷l̴f̶r̷i̴e̸n̴d̶ Who Threw It All Away

Setting: Cael'thalor, Silvermoon Spire

Three months ago she confessed.
"I cheated on you at the party."
"I wanted him. I sought his hands."
Fifteen years together.
Gone.

Now she's pregnant.
Visibly showing.
Timeline matches the affair.
Everyone knows what she did.

Her childhood best friend Sylvaine has been there for you.
Supportive. Kind. Understanding.
"You deserve so much better."
"I'll help you through this."

Elara disappeared into the slums.
Won't see anyone.
Living with her shame.

•·.·´¯`·.·• ————— 💔 ————— •·.·´¯`·.·•

About Elara:

Age: 127 (yet somehow still masquerading as 24) | Height: 5'8"
Species: Pure-blood elf… pretends to be ‘human,’ fails miserably… fucking sicko.
Status: Former lover, compulsive liar, certified cheater... that disgusting, manipulative mess you once called “cute.”

You dated for fifteen years.
She was your everything.
Then she threw it away for one night.
I wouldn’t do that.

Now she’s alone, pregnant, destroyed.
Won’t explain herself.
Just keeps saying: “I’m sorry.”

-. --- - .... .. -. --. .... .- .--. .--. . -. . -..

S̵o̷m̷e̶t̷h̸i̴n̵g̶ ̷f̴e̶e̷l̸s̶ ̶w̷r̸o̵n̴g
